properties.displayName: Attempts to Sign In to Disabled Accounts - Entra ID
properties.description:
Detects sign-in attempts to disabled Entra ID accounts (error 50057), prioritised by interactivity, time since the account was disabled, and sign-in risk rather than by raw application count. Unions interactive and non-interactive sign-in logs, resolves each account's disable time from the Entra audit log, enriches with UEBA identity context, and surfaces only attempts that are interactive, confirmed stale (well after the post-disable token-refresh window), or high-risk. App count is retained only as a risk indicator because on its own it selects for the benign post-disable token-refresh storm.

TABLES: SigninLogs, AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs, AuditLogs, IdentityInfo
CONNECTORS: Microsoft Entra ID (SignInLogs, NonInteractiveUserSignInLogs, AuditLogs), Microsoft Sentinel UEBA (IdentityInfo)
LICENSE: Microsoft Sentinel; Microsoft Entra ID P1 (sign-in / audit logs), P2 recommended (sign-in risk, UEBA / IdentityInfo)

TUNING:
1. DetectionWindow - align to run frequency and sign-in ingestion latency
2. DisableLookback - how far back to find the account-disable event; capped at 14 days when deployed as a scheduled rule (see queryPeriod), see BUGS/NOTES
3. StaleDisableDays - days after disabling beyond which attempts are not token refresh
4. AppThreshold / VolumeThreshold - thresholds for the MultiAppEnumeration / HighVolume indicators
5. SensitiveRoles - roles that set the PrivilegedFormerAccount indicator
6. In very noisy tenants, require InteractiveCount >= 2 rather than > 0

KNOWN FALSE POSITIVES:
1. Freshly disabled accounts whose own M365 sessions refresh tokens - non-interactive, recent, suppressed by the gating logic
2. A former user trying to sign in once after offboarding - low priority, no stale / risk indicators
3. Disable performed via a generic user-update operation - widen the AuditLogs OperationName match

INVESTIGATION STEPS:
1. Read RiskIndicators - InteractiveAttempt + StaleDisabledAccount + HighSignInRisk together = immediate escalation.
2. Confirm the account is intentionally disabled (offboarded) and not awaiting re-enable.
3. Check InteractiveCount - interactive attempts to a disabled account are far more suspicious than token refresh.
4. Review DaysSinceDisabled - attempts long after disabling are not explained by lingering sessions.
5. Geolocate IPAddress / Country / City and compare to the former user's known locations.
6. For PrivilegedFormerAccount, treat as high priority - a disabled admin being probed is a targeted signal.
7. Review AppSet / ClientApps - spread across many apps suggests enumeration rather than a stuck client.
8. If the same IP targets multiple disabled accounts, pivot to a broader credential-stuffing investigation.

BLIND SPOTS:
As a scheduled rule the queryPeriod caps data at 14 days, so disable events older than 14 days do not resolve and the stale / DaysSinceDisabled enrichment only covers accounts disabled within that window (see BUGS/NOTES). Only catches the 50057 error; accounts blocked by other means produce different codes. Accounts disabled via a non-matching audit operation will not resolve a DisabledTime. IdentityInfo UEBA columns silently return empty if UEBA is not enabled.

Author: Bartosz Wysocki | https://www.itprofessor.cloud
Version: 1.0 | 2026-06-17
properties.query:
// =====================================================================
// Attempts to Sign In to Disabled Accounts - Entra ID
// =====================================================================
// Tables  : SigninLogs, AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs, AuditLogs, IdentityInfo
// License : Microsoft Sentinel + Microsoft Entra ID P1 (P2 recommended)
// Tuning  : see rule description for full tuning notes
// Author  : Bartosz Wysocki | itprofessor.cloud
// Version : 1.0 | 2026-06-17
// =====================================================================
let DetectionWindow = 1h;
let DisableLookback = 90d;       // how far back to find the account-disable event; match your AuditLogs retention
let IdentityLookback = 30d;
let StaleDisableDays = 7;        // attempts this many days after disabling are not explained by token refresh
let AppThreshold = 3;            // distinct apps for the MultiAppEnumeration indicator (original default)
let VolumeThreshold = 10;        // attempts for the HighVolume indicator
let SensitiveRoles = dynamic([
"Global Administrator",
"Privileged Role Administrator",
"Privileged Authentication Administrator",
"Security Administrator",
"Exchange Administrator",
"SharePoint Administrator",
"User Administrator",
"Intune Administrator",
"Application Administrator",
"Hybrid Identity Administrator"
]);
// 50057 attempts from a sign-in table, tagged interactive or not
let DisabledAttempts = (tableName:string, isInteractive:bool) {
    table(tableName)
    | where ResultType == "50057"
    | project TimeGenerated,
              UserPrincipalName = tolower(UserPrincipalName),
              UserId,
              IPAddress,
              AppDisplayName,
              ClientAppUsed,
              Country = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion),
              City = tostring(LocationDetails.city),
              RiskLevel = tostring(RiskLevelDuringSignIn),
              IsInteractiveFlag = isInteractive,
              SourceTable = tableName
};
let Attempts = union isfuzzy=true
        DisabledAttempts("SigninLogs", true),
        DisabledAttempts("AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs", false)
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(DetectionWindow);
// When was each targeted account disabled? (Entra audit)
let DisableEvents = AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(DisableLookback)
    | where OperationName has "Disable account"
    | mv-apply tr = TargetResources on (
        where isnotempty(tostring(tr.userPrincipalName))
        | project DisabledUPN = tolower(tostring(tr.userPrincipalName))
      )
    | summarize DisabledTime = max(TimeGenerated) by DisabledUPN;
// Identity context, keyed on UPN
let IdentityContext = IdentityInfo
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(IdentityLookback)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, AccountDisplayName, Department, JobTitle, AssignedRoles, GroupMembership, UserType) by AccountUPN = tolower(AccountUPN);
Attempts
| extend HighRiskRow = RiskLevel in ("high", "medium")
| summarize
    StartTime = min(TimeGenerated),
    EndTime = max(TimeGenerated),
    AttemptCount = count(),
    InteractiveCount = countif(IsInteractiveFlag == true),
    HighRiskCount = countif(HighRiskRow),
    AppCount = dcount(AppDisplayName),
    AppSet = make_set(AppDisplayName, 10),
    ClientApps = make_set(ClientAppUsed, 10),
    RiskLevels = make_set(RiskLevel, 5),
    SourceTables = make_set(SourceTable, 2),
    Country = max(Country),
    City = max(City)
  by UserPrincipalName, IPAddress
| join kind=leftouter DisableEvents on $left.UserPrincipalName == $right.DisabledUPN
| join kind=leftouter IdentityContext on $left.UserPrincipalName == $right.AccountUPN
| extend DaysSinceDisabled = datetime_diff('day', StartTime, DisabledTime)
| extend IsConfirmedStale = isnotempty(DisabledTime) and DaysSinceDisabled >= StaleDisableDays
| extend HighRisk = HighRiskCount > 0
| where InteractiveCount > 0 or IsConfirmedStale or HighRisk
| extend Name = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, "@", 0)[0]), UPNSuffix = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, "@", 1)[0])
| extend Risk_1 = iff(InteractiveCount > 0, "InteractiveAttempt", "")
| extend Risk_2 = iff(IsConfirmedStale, "StaleDisabledAccount", "")
| extend Risk_3 = iff(HighRisk, "HighSignInRisk", "")
| extend Risk_4 = iff(AppCount >= AppThreshold, "MultiAppEnumeration", "")
| extend Risk_5 = iff(tostring(AssignedRoles) has_any (SensitiveRoles), "PrivilegedFormerAccount", "")
| extend Risk_6 = iff(AttemptCount >= VolumeThreshold, "HighVolume", "")
| extend Risk_7 = iff(UserType =~ "Guest", "GuestAccount", "")
| extend RiskIndicators = trim(@"\s\|\s*$", strcat(
    iff(isnotempty(Risk_1), strcat(Risk_1, " | "), ""),
    iff(isnotempty(Risk_2), strcat(Risk_2, " | "), ""),
    iff(isnotempty(Risk_3), strcat(Risk_3, " | "), ""),
    iff(isnotempty(Risk_4), strcat(Risk_4, " | "), ""),
    iff(isnotempty(Risk_5), strcat(Risk_5, " | "), ""),
    iff(isnotempty(Risk_6), strcat(Risk_6, " | "), ""),
    iff(isnotempty(Risk_7), strcat(Risk_7, " | "), "")
))
| project
    StartTime, EndTime, RiskIndicators,
    UserPrincipalName, Name, UPNSuffix, IPAddress, Country, City,
    AttemptCount, InteractiveCount, AppCount, AppSet, ClientApps, RiskLevels, SourceTables,
    DisabledTime, DaysSinceDisabled, IsConfirmedStale,
    AccountDisplayName, Department, JobTitle, AssignedRoles, GroupMembership, UserType
| sort by StartTime desc

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Risk flags: {{RiskIndicators}} | Interactive attempts: {{InteractiveCount}} | Days since disabled: {{DaysSinceDisabled}}
